notes: v244 — Fits your screen. When the results table is wider than the window, it now automatically tightens its spacing, link row and column padding so the right-hand columns (News 5d, Signals) come back on screen — and relaxes again on wide monitors. If a screen is still too narrow after tightening, the scrollbar remains so nothing is ever hidden. Tip: the Hide panel button and dragging the sidebar divider free up even more room.
